LAW AND MOTION 610, NANCY LAWLOR APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DENNIS GEE APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 708.170 IS GRANTED. THE FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION ON JANUARY 16, 2004 WAS WITHOUT GOOD CAUSE. BEFORE THE JUDGMENT WAS AMENDED ON FEBRUARY 5, 2004, THE COURT HAD INSTRUCTED THE DEFENDANT TO APPEAR FOR AN ORDER OF EXAMINATION ON FEBRUARY 25, 2004. ACCORDINGLY, THE FAILURE TO APPEAR ON THAT DATE WAS WITHOUT GOOD CAUSE. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,750. SAID FEES ARE TO BE ADDED TO AND BECOME PART OF THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (610/BCHAN)
